title: Yuki's Sleepy Peek-a-Boo
synopsis: Little Yuki plays peek-a-boo with her favorite bedtime friends as she gets ready for sleep, finding teddy bears, moon, and stars hiding in cozy places.

pages.text: Yuki is ready for bed. But where are her sleepy friends? Let's play peek-a-boo!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes stands in pajamas in a cozy bedroom with curtains partially hiding objects behind them, creating a peek-a-boo composition with interactive feel
illustration.alt: Yuki in pajamas in bedroom with hidden objects behind curtains

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is Teddy? Behind the pillow! There you are, Teddy!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes lifting a pillow to reveal a teddy bear partially hidden underneath, surprise element with playful concealment in lift the flap inspired style
illustration.alt: Yuki finding teddy bear behind pillow

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where is the moon? Behind the window curtain! Hello, moon!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes pulling back a window curtain to reveal the smiling moon partially hidden behind it, hiding and revealing composition with behind the curtain style

pages.text: Peek-a-boo! Where are the sleepy stars? Behind the blanket! Twinkle, twinkle!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes holding up a blanket to show glowing stars partially hidden objects underneath, peek-a-boo composition with surprise element and interactive feel

pages.text: Now all friends are here! Teddy, moon, and stars. Time to sleep. Peek-a-boo, sleepy Yuki!

illustration.description: Yuki with straight black hair with a red headband, light skin, almond-shaped dark brown eyes tucked in bed with teddy bear, with moon and stars visible through window, playful concealment as she closes her eyes for sleep in lift the flap inspired style
illustration.alt: Yuki sleeping with all her bedtime friends

metadata.illustrationStyle: lift the flap inspired, partially hidden objects, peek-a-boo composition, hiding and revealing, interactive feel, surprise element, behind the curtain, playful concealment

questions.question: Where was Teddy hiding?
questions.explanation: Teddy was hiding behind the pillow when Yuki played peek-a-boo!

questions.question: What was behind the window curtain?
questions.explanation: The smiling moon was hiding behind the window curtain!

questions.question: What did Yuki do at the end?
questions.explanation: Yuki went to sleep with all her bedtime friends - Teddy, moon, and stars!
